title: JavaScript heap out of memory during n8n audit
symptom: When running the n8n audit command, the process fails with a 'JavaScript heap out of memory' error. This occurs even after increasing the memory limit to 3GB.
applies_when: Self-hosted instance with large execution history
not_this_if: Using a fresh n8n instance with no execution history
root_cause: The n8n audit command attempts to load the entire execution history into memory, which can exceed the allocated memory limit, especially if the history is large. This results in a failure due to insufficient memory.
fix_steps: Set the environment variable NODE_OPTIONS to increase memory limit: export NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=8192'
Run the command n8n db:prune to clear old execution logs, or set EXECUTIONS_DATA_MAX_AGE to a lower value.
If memory issues persist, consider exporting workflows/credentials to a fresh n8n instance with no history and running the audit there.
agent_instruction: Increase the memory limit to 8GB and prune old execution logs before running the audit command.
